basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) has officially announced the Executive (Outreach) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Eligible candidates preferably below 45 years of age holding a B.Tech in any discipline, PGDM, MBA, or a Master's Program in International Relations from a reputed Business School/ Management Institution can submit their applications through email on or before 27 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Btech in any discipline/ PGDM / MBA / Master's Program in International Relations from a reputed Business school/Management Institution.
qualification.details: Executive (Outreach): Btech in any discipline/ PGDM / MBA /Master's Program in International Relations from a reputed Business school/Management Institution. Desirable: 3 years' experience in International Relations Office / Alumni relations office of IITS / NITs / Central Universities / other reputed institutions/ CSR Foundations.

selection_process: Online application Payment of prescribed fee Emailing relevant documents Selection process (may include skill test and/or trade test)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Calicut Executive (Outreach) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.national_institute_of_technology_calicut: Btech in any discipline/ PGDM / MBA / Master's Program in International Relations from a reputed Business school/Management Institution.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Executive Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Calicut Executive Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Executive (Outreach): Btech in any discipline/ PGDM / MBA /Master's Program in International Relations from a reputed Business school/Management Institution. Desirable: 3 years' experience in International Relations Office / Alumni relations office of IITS / NITs / Central Universities / other reputed institutions/ CSR Foundations.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Online application Payment of prescribed fee Emailing relevant documents Selection process (may include skill test and/or trade test)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Calicut Executive (Outreach) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Executive Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Calicut Executive (Outreach) position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Executive (Outreach) position at NIT Calicut is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Executive (Outreach) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech in any discipline, or a PGDM/MBA, or a Master's Program in International Relations from a recognized institution. Experience in international relations or alumni relations is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The preferred age limit for the Executive (Outreach) position is below 45 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules, which can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Executive (Outreach) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated monthly remuneration of Rs. 70,000/- for the Executive (Outreach) position.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Calicut Executive (Outreach) job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to fill out the application form, pay the fee, and then email the form along with required documents to the specified email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Executive (Outreach) position at NIT Calicut is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is P1/Adhoc/Recr/2026-27.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Executive (Outreach) post.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIT Calicut located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Calicut is located in Calicut, Kerala, with the pincode 673601.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with your application.
